mapper.insert: INSERT INTO replyRecommend(replyRecommendno, rdate, replyno, memberno) VALUES (replyRecommend_seq.nextval, sysdate, #{replyno}, #{memberno})
mapper.select: SELECT replyRecommendno, rdate, replyno, memberno FROM replyRecommend ORDER BY replyRecommendno DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM replyRecommend WHERE replyno = #{replyno} AND memberno = #{memberno}
